zh.Sprotbrough, Yorkshire, England: 英國越可爾斯普洛特布盧
zh.lifeSummary: 當Fulk d' Aulney於1062年出生在英國越可爾斯普洛特布盧時，他的父親Fouque de Aulnay III27歲，母親Albreda de Lincolnshire23歲。他於1096年與Adeliza d'Auberville在英國越可爾結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1153年在英國越可爾多卡斯特享年91歲。

zh-hans.Sprotbrough, Yorkshire, England: 英国越可爾斯普洛特布盧
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Fulk d' Aulney于1062年出生在英国越可爾斯普洛特布盧时，他的父亲Fouque de Aulnay III27岁，母亲Albreda de Lincolnshire23岁。他于1096年与Adeliza d'Auberville在英国越可爾结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1153年在英国越可爾多卡斯特享年91岁。

nameMeanings.name: Aulney
meanings: Irish: Aluin, beautiful, and neać, an individual, meaning a pleasing person

nameMeanings.name: Fulk
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Of Germanic origin, introduced to Britain by the Normans. The name was originally a short form of various compound names containing the word volk ‘people, tribe’ (compare modern English folk). It has gradually died out of general use, but is still used in certain families, in particular the Grevilles. Fulke Greville, 1st Baron Brooke, was a leading figure at the court of Elizabeth I. See also Greville .

variants.name: Fulke
meanings: Of Germanic origin, introduced to Britain by the Normans. The name was originally a short form of various compound names containing the word volk ‘people, tribe’ (compare modern English folk). It has gradually died out of general use, but is still used in certain families, in particular the Grevilles. Fulke Greville, 1st Baron Brooke, was a leading figure at the court of Elizabeth I. See also Greville .

historicEvents.title: Battle of Hastings
historicEvents.description: Battle of Hastings was fought between the Norman-French army and the battle-wary English army on October 14, 1066. Duke William of Normandy believed he was the rightful king rather than Harold, who had been crowned king several months earlier. Harold was killed in battle and William was crowned king on Christmas Day 1066.

historicEvents.title: Domesday Book
historicEvents.description: Domesday Book is Britain's earliest extant public record with information containing land surveys and landholdings commissioned by William I. The book was completed in 1086.

historicEvents.title: The Crusades
historicEvents.description: A series of religious wars between Christians and Muslims, known as the Crusades, occurred between 1096 and 1291, and played a large role in European Christian dominance in the Middle East.

en.lifeSummary: When Fulk d' Aulney was born in 1062, in Sprotbrough, Yorkshire, England, his father, Fouque de Aulnay III, was 27 and his mother, Albreda de Lincolnshire, was 23. He married Adeliza d'Auberville in 1096, in Yorkshire, England. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 2 daughters. He died in 1153, in Doncaster, Yorkshire, England, at the age of 91.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Fulk d' Aulney est né en 1062, à Sprotbrough, Everwyck, Angleterre, son père, Fouque de Aulnay III, avait 27 ans et sa mère, Albreda de Lincolnshire, avait 23 ans. Il a épousé Adeliza d'Auberville en 1096, à Everwyck, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé en 1153, à Doncaster, Everwyck, Angleterre, à l’âge de 91 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Fulk d' Aulney 1062 in Sprotbrough, Yorkshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Fouque de Aulnay III 27 und seine Mutter Albreda de Lincolnshire 23. Er hat 1096 in Yorkshire, England Adeliza d'Auberville geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb 1153 im Alter von 91 Jahren in Doncaster, Yorkshire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Fulk d' Aulney è nato il nel 1062 nel Sprotbrough, Yorkshire, England, il suo padre, Fouque de Aulnay III, aveva 27 anni e il suo madre, Albreda de Lincolnshire, aveva 23 anni. Lui sposato Adeliza d'Auberville nel 1096, nel Yorkshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 2 figlie. Morì nel 1153, nel Doncaster, Yorkshire, England, all'età di 91 anni.

ja.Spratborough, Yorkshire, England: イギリスイギリスヨークシュアイア
ja.Somme, Picardie, France: フランスピカーディソンメ
ja.Lincoln, Lincolnshire, England: イギリスリンコルンシュアイアリンコルン
ja.Sprotbrough, Yorkshire, England: イギリスヨークシュアイアスプロトブロウ
ja.Doncaster, Yorkshire, England: イギリスヨークシュアイアドンカスター
ja.lifeSummary: Fulk d' Aulneyが1062年にイギリスヨークシュアイアスプロトブロウで生まれた時，父Fouque de Aulnay IIIは27歳，母Albreda de Lincolnshireは23歳であった。1096年にイギリスヨークシュアイアでAdeliza d'Aubervilleと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1153年にイギリスヨークシュアイアドンカスターで91歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Fulk d' Aulney(이)가 1062년 영국 요르크실르 스프로트브루그h에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Fouque de Aulnay III(은)는 27세였고, 그의 어머니 Albreda de Lincolnshire(은)는 23세였다. 그는 1096년 영국 요르크실르에서 Adeliza d'Auberville(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1153년 영국 요르크실르 돈카스터에서 91세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Fulk d' Aulney nasceu em 1062, em Sprotbrough, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Fouque de Aulnay III, tinha 27 anos e sua mãe, Albreda de Lincolnshire, tinha 23 anos. Ele casou-se com Adeliza d'Auberville em 1096, em Yorkshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 1153, em Doncaster, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, com 91 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Fulk d' Aulney родился в 1062 г. в местности спротброую, еркшир, Англия, его отцу по имени Fouque de Aulnay III было 27 лет, а матери, которую звали Albreda de Lincolnshire, 23. Он женился на женщине по имени Adeliza d'Auberville в 1096 г. в местности еркшир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 2 дочери. Он умер в 1153 г. в местности донкастир, еркшир, Англия в возрасте 91 год.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Fulk d' Aulney nació en 1062, en Sprotbrough, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Fouque de Aulnay III, tenía 27 años y su mamá, Albreda de Lincolnshire, tenía 23 años. Se casó con Adeliza d'Auberville en 1096, en Yorkshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió en 1153, en Doncaster, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 91 años.
